title: Jabalpur Boat Tragedy: Viral Photo of Mother and Son Real or Fake? Here's What Jabalpur Collector Has To Say
description: A viral photo of a mother holding her child is being falsely linked to the Jabalpur Bargi Dam boat tragedy. Officials confirm the image is unrelated, highlighting how misinformation spreads during crises. The real incident left nine dead, survivors recounting chaos, and authorities probing safety lapses.
